channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Portfolio projects: ship, don't polish
item.description: Cut remote job screen time 60%: ship a live system recruiters can deploy and break in 10 minutes — Fly.io, FastAPI, Go, and chaos endpoints that prove you won’t wake them at 2 AM.

item.title: RAG pipelines: why your 90ms latency hides a disaster
item.description: Cut RAG p99 latency to 310ms and AWS bill 54% with Redis bloom filters, compact vectors, and a circuit breaker — mistakes we made and the numbers behind the fix.

item.title: Skills that move the salary needle in 2026
item.description: Discover which AI skills actually boost your 2026 salary — prompt engineering vs RAG pipeline design with real benchmark data, cost breakdowns, and salary ranges.

item.title: Pick the realtime tool in 2026
item.description: Cut realtime latency 60% with the right protocol — WebSocket vs SSE vs long polling benchmarks, nginx 1.25.4, Redis 7.2, and the exact config files you need

item.title: Wrong pool size? Slower app
item.description: The database response time was 420 ms on average.

item.title: Skip zero-trust noise: 3 rules for small teams
item.description: Cut security noise for small teams: skip service mesh and mTLS unless regulated. Focus on secrets, short-lived tokens, and network isolation to reduce real risk fast.

item.title: Negotiate remote pay from low-cost lands
item.description: Use Numbeo 2026 data to cut remote salary gaps by 28% with exact multipliers and markdown tables that recruiters actually read. Stop guessing — run the script and negotiate today.

item.title: RAG prod: 3 costs no tutorial warns
item.description: Cut RAG pipeline costs 40% and latency 22% — the real traps tutorials never mention: cache stampede, Vietnamese tokenization, and Redis vs Qdrant trade-offs

item.title: Mis-size your DB pool? You're stealing CPU
item.description: Cut database costs 70% by setting connection pool size to 2× CPU cores — not users. Real benchmarks from Node.js, Go, and Python systems in 2026.

item.title: Choose WebSocket, SSE or long-poll wisely
item.description: Choose SSE over WebSocket for leaderboards in 2026 — cuts AWS bill $323/month and halves CPU at 10 k users

item.title: Portfolio that lands remote jobs: show work, not
item.description: Portfolio that lands remote jobs from Africa: show one runnable project, not certificates. Benchmarks, deploy scripts, GitHub pinning tactics. 2026 hiring data included.

item.title: Skills That Raise AI Salaries in 2026
item.description: Cut your path to a $192k AI salary in 2026 — prompt engineering vs MLOps with concrete benchmarks, cost data, and hiring trends across the US, UK, Germany, and Singapore.

item.title: Shard AI workloads, not users
item.description: Cut AI API p99 latency 60% with Redis caching and Qdrant 1.8 — embedding cache, rate limits, and the cache stampede mistake most teams miss.

item.title: 8 connection pool myths debunked
item.description: Cut cloud costs 30% by fixing one connection pool setting — the math most teams get wrong, benchmarks from PostgreSQL 15, and the exact config to start with today.

item.title: Choose WebSockets, SSE, or long polling
item.description: Compare WebSockets vs SSE vs long polling with real 2026 latency numbers and cost data to pick the right realtime tool for your use case.

item.title: $5k remote: How to get paid fairly from Bogotá
item.description: Use 2026 data to negotiate remote salaries from lower-cost countries — avoid 30% lowballs with PPP-adjusted benchmarks and a negotiation script that works.

item.title: Portfolio beats LeetCode: hire without Silicon Valley
item.description: Cut interview time 70% with a production-grade portfolio — real Grafana dashboards, health endpoints, and one repo beat 200 GitHub stars. 2026 numbers, tools, and post-mortem scripts included.

item.title: Fix RAG latency before users quit
item.description: Cut RAG pipeline latency 87% by splitting retrieval and generation — real numbers, code, and the cache mistake most teams make.

item.title: 5G kills backend metrics you trust
item.description: Cut API response time 50% on 4G — measure cellular RTT, TCP handshakes, and connection pool waits before touching code. Includes Node.js 20, Redis 7.2, and k6 0.51 examples.

item.title: 2026 AI salaries: MLOps vs prompt engineering
item.description: ML Ops vs prompt engineering salaries in 2026 — $215k vs $155k median, failure rates, cost savings, and the real skills that move the needle.
